Term Sheet for Series B Funding

Date: 5 December 2023

Issuer: TechVenture Pte. Ltd. (UEN: T23LL1234A)

Investor: Quantum Capital Partners

Principal Amount: SGD 15,000,000

Lead Contact: Dr. John Tan, +65 6123 4567, john.tan@quantum.sg

Address of Issuer: 123 Innovation Drive, Singapore 567890

NRIC of Lead Contact: https://example.sg/user/S7654321G

Closing: Subject to the satisfactory completion of due diligence and the execution of a Share Purchase Agreement (the "SPA"). The SPA shall include customary representations and warranties.

Mr. Alex Lim shall oversee the project plan to ensure alignment with strategic objectives, but the project status will not impact the closure of this funding round.

Please note that all financial and legal obligations are contingent upon the execution of the SPA.
